title: Modport item not found with -fno-inline in --hierarchical child compilations

features.name: interface with modport definitions
features.description: Code should include an interface with multiple modport definitions, each declaring different signal directions

features.name: hier_block attribute on module
features.description: Code should include a module marked with verilator hier_block attribute for hierarchical compilation

features.name: interface connection via modport-typed port
features.description: Code should include module ports typed to specific modports, connecting interface instances through modport interfaces

features.name: hierarchical mode with non-inline flag
features.description: Code should include a compilation setup using both --hierarchical flag and -fno-inline optimization flag for hierarchical builds
